nodes.label: When content=None and success=False, __post_init__ copies error to content.
success=True with content=None should NOT be overwritten.
Explicit content on a failed result should NOT be overwritten.
When both content and error are None, use a generic fallback.
Two modules cannot provide the same tool name.
list_tools() should only include tools from ONLINE modules.
find_tools returns tools from ALL modules, not just ONLINE.
